code_snippets.cooking_method_texture_fatigue_analysis:
# Analyze if specific cooking methods repeat during identified 3-day negative residual streaks
streak_indices = df_train[df_train['neg_resid_streak_3d'] == 1].index
# We look at the distribution of cooking methods when a slump is occurring
slump_cooking_methods = df_train.loc[streak_indices, 'cooking_method'].value_counts(normalize=True)
overall_cooking_methods = df_train['cooking_method'].value_counts(normalize=True)

texture_fatigue_df = pandas.DataFrame({
    'slump_ratio': slump_cooking_methods,
    'overall_ratio': overall_cooking_methods
}).fillna(0)
texture_fatigue_df['lift'] = texture_fatigue_df['slump_ratio'] / texture_fatigue_df['overall_ratio']

print("Cooking Method Distribution Comparison (Slump vs Overall):")
print(texture_fatigue_df.sort_values(by='lift', ascending=False))
code_snippets.kcal_temp_ratio_demand_analysis:
# Compare average sales volume (y) and soldout rate across kcal_temp_ratio quantiles
demand_supply_summary = df_train.groupby('kcal_temp_ratio_quantile').agg({
    'y': ['mean', 'median', 'std', 'count'],
    'soldout_int': 'mean'
})
print("Demand and Soldout Analysis by kcal_temp_ratio Quantile:")
print(demand_supply_summary)
code_snippets.rainy_day_curry_seafood_comparison:
# Compare residuals between Curry and Seafood menu categories on Rainy days
rainy_days_filter = (df_train['weather_雨'] == 1)
curry_seafood_filter = df_train['menu_category'].isin(['Curry', 'Seafood'])

rain_comparison = df_train[rainy_days_filter & curry_seafood_filter].groupby('menu_category')['ts_residuals'].agg(['mean', 'std', 'count'])
print("Residual Comparison: Curry vs Seafood on Rainy Days")
print(rain_comparison)
code_snippets.monday_otanoshimi_synergy_check:
# Evaluate the interaction between Monday and Otanoshimi Menu
df_train['is_otanoshimi'] = df_train['remarks_normalized'].apply(lambda x: 1 if 'お楽しみメニュー' in str(x) else 0)
df_train['monday_otanoshimi_interaction'] = df_train['is_monday'] * df_train['is_otanoshimi']

synergy_stats = df_train.groupby(['is_monday', 'is_otanoshimi'])['y'].agg(['mean', 'median', 'count']).unstack()
print("Sales Volume (y) Synergy: Monday vs Otanoshimi Menu")
print(synergy_stats)

plot_snippets.texture_fatigue_visualization:
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.countplot(data=df_train[df_train['neg_resid_streak_3d'] == 1], x='cooking_method', palette='viridis', order=df_train['cooking_method'].value_counts().index)
plt.title('Frequency of Cooking Methods during Negative Residual Streaks (Texture Fatigue Check)')
plt.xticks(rotation=45)
plt.show()
plot_snippets.quantile_demand_supply_boxplot:
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
sns.boxplot(data=df_train, x='kcal_temp_ratio_quantile', y='y', hue='soldout_int')
plt.title('Sales Volume Distribution by kcal_temp_ratio_quantile and Soldout Status')
plt.grid(True, axis='y', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)
plt.show()
plot_snippets.rainy_day_residuals_violinplot:
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
rain_data = df_train[(df_train['weather_雨'] == 1) & (df_train['menu_category'].isin(['Curry', 'Seafood']))]
sns.violinplot(data=rain_data, x='menu_category', y='ts_residuals', inner='quartile')
plt.axhline(0, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
plt.title('Residual Distribution: Curry vs Seafood on Rainy Days')
plt.show()
plot_snippets.monday_otanoshimi_interaction_plot:
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.pointplot(data=df_train, x='is_monday', y='y', hue='is_otanoshimi', markers=['o', 's'], linestyles=['-', '--'])
plt.title('Interaction Plot: Monday and Otanoshimi Menu Effectiveness')
plt.xlabel('Is Monday (0: No, 1: Yes)')
plt.ylabel('Average Sales Volume (y)')
plt.legend(title='Otanoshimi Menu')
plt.show()
